name_en: Goyard 2025 Limited Edition: Goyard takes us on a stroll through a ever-changing, blooming garden, offering a dual enjoyment of the senses and emotions. The SAINT LOUIS Large Bag features two unique GOYARDINE canvas colors inspired by the vivid tones of flax flowers, better highlighting the double-sided use inspiration in the original SAINT LOUIS design.
name_cn:
Goyard 2025 Limited Edition: Goyard takes us on a stroll through a ever-changing, blooming garden, offering a dual enjoyment of the senses and emotions. The SAINT LOUIS Large Bag features two unique GOYARDINE canvas colors inspired by the vivid tones of flax flowers, better highlighting the double-sided use inspiration in the original SAINT LOUIS design.
GM size: 40×20×32cm, opening 57cm
Color: Rose Red
